GameConditionDef.label: whiteout
GameConditionDef.description: A catastrophic deep freeze is approaching, eventually leading to a complete whiteout.

li.letterText: Atmospheric temperatures are steadily dropping across the planet.\n\nThis is not a standard cold snap. You predict a catastrophic deep freeze is approaching, eventually leading to a complete whiteout. You have a short window to stockpile fuel, harvest your remaining crops, and build heaters before the true cold sets in.

The cold has deepened drastically.\n\nWildlife is fleeing the region, and the flora is dying off. Ensure your colony stays indoors and that your power grid can handle the immense strain of constant heating. The worst is still yet to come.

The whiteout has arrived.

Temperatures have plummeted to unsurvivable levels. Human travel across the planet is now entirely unadvised; you will receive no trade caravans or human raids. However, the bitter cold does not bother mechanoids.

If you persevere, the freeze will eventually break.
The skies are finally clearing and the bitter cold is beginning to recede.\n\nThe whiteout is ending. Temperatures will slowly return to normal over the next quadrum, and life will eventually return.

GameConditionDef.label: Global Warming
GameConditionDef.description:
Global temperatures have suddenly risen to dangerous levels.
Flora and Fauna is suffering from these changes as biomes shift into their warmer counterparts. Resources become scarce, forcing factions into conflict.
It will last anywhere between a season to several years.

GameConditionDef.label: Psychic Rain
GameConditionDef.description:
A dangerous psychic entity caused disturbance on subatomic levels, resonating across all particles of the atmosphere.
A seemingly endless supernatural rain has begun, altering the very composition of time. Any person or creature not under the roof will age significantly faster.
It will last anywhere between a season to several years.

GameConditionDef.label: Long Night
GameConditionDef.description:
A space entity of unimaginable size has covered a local star, resulting in a long lasting eclipse.
Terrified of this supernatural phenomenon, other factions will use this time to wage war and conflict across the surface.
It will last anywhere between a season to several years.

GameConditionDef.label: Psychic Bloom
GameConditionDef.description:
A strong psychic pulse emitted by a long forgotten entity changed the very genetical structure of local flora. Whilst the sky filled with a seemingly endless auroras, colourful flowers started sprouting everywhere.
All pawns will gain a positive mood buff for the time of the event. The rapidly spreading flowers will overgrow everything, including your fields.
It will last anywhere between a few days to a season.
